methodology_offense: This dataset was curated by searching YouTube for open-access football coaching videos relevant to each offensive position. Searches targeted reputable coaching channels and sources including AFCA, Glazier Clinics, CoachTube preview clips, USA Football/Nike/Play Football series, and named college or NFL coaches. Source reputation, speaker identification, direct position relevance, and coaching value were used as primary quality filters. YouTube public dislikes and aggregate review scores are not reliably available to outside tools; therefore, poor-quality filtering was approximated by (1) excluding videos from unclear or unknown sources unless uniquely valuable, (2) excluding content from non-football-specific platforms (TikTok, Instagram, Facebook), (3) requiring direct position coaching relevance rather than general football commentary, and (4) prioritizing videos where speaker credentials are verifiable from title or description metadata. Duration estimates are drawn from search metadata where available; some are approximate. All URLs are YouTube only.
methodology_defense: This dataset was curated by systematically searching YouTube for open-access football coaching videos covering 11 defensive positions. Search queries targeted reputable channels and named coaches including AFCA, Glazier Clinics, MatchQuarters (Cody Alexander), All Eyes DB Camp / Chad Wilson, USA Football, CoachTube-linked content, and named college/NFL coaches. Selections prioritized (1) source reputation and verifiable speaker credentials, (2) direct positional relevance and instructional depth, and (3) open YouTube access. NOTE ON QUALITY FILTERING: YouTube public dislike counts and user review data are not reliably available (YouTube removed public dislikes in November 2021). Poor-review filtering was therefore approximated by source reputation (e.g., AFCA convention presentations, Power Five program coaches, established coaching educators), content relevance, instructional quality evident from transcripts, and channel authority. TikTok, Instagram, and Facebook links were excluded by design. Videos from unverifiable anonymous speakers were excluded unless uniquely valuable for position-specific content not otherwise available. Duration estimates are drawn from search metadata where available; where not returned, they are marked as 'unknown' and should be verified directly on YouTube.
